Container.Name: PlexyTrack
Container.Overview: PlexyTrack synchronizes your Plex library with Trakt and/or Simkl. It supports bidirectional sync of watched history, ratings, collections, liked lists and watchlists. A simple web UI lets you configure sync options, select Plex users, and create backups of your data. Live Sync via Plex webhooks is also available for instant updates.
Container.Description: PlexyTrack synchronizes your Plex library with Trakt and/or Simkl. It supports bidirectional sync of watched history, ratings, collections, liked lists and watchlists. A simple web UI lets you configure sync options, select Plex users, and create backups of your data.
Container.ExtraSearchTerms: plex trakt simkl sync media tracker
Container.Requires: Plex Media Server and a Trakt and/or Simkl account with API credentials.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the PlexyTrack web interface.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Path to store PlexyTrack configuration files (tokens, settings).

Config.Name: State Directory
Config.Description: Path to store PlexyTrack sync state files.

Config.Name: Plex Server URL
Config.Description: URL of your Plex Media Server (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:32400).

Config.Name: Trakt Client ID
Config.Description: Client ID from your Trakt API application. Required if syncing with Trakt.

Config.Name: Trakt Client Secret
Config.Description: Client Secret from your Trakt API application. Required if syncing with Trakt.

Config.Name: Simkl Client ID
Config.Description: Client ID from your Simkl API application. Required if syncing with Simkl.

Config.Name: Simkl Client Secret
Config.Description: Client Secret from your Simkl API application. Required if syncing with Simkl.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for log timestamps (e.g. America/New_York, Europe/London).

Config.Name: Trakt Redirect URI
Config.Description: Custom OAuth redirect URI for Trakt (optional). Leave empty for auto-detection.

Config.Name: Simkl Redirect URI
Config.Description: Custom OAuth redirect URI for Simkl (optional). Leave empty for auto-detection.
